Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=8-desmethylnovobiocic acid + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = novobiocic acid + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:36651, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:73953, ChEBI:CHEBI:73954; EC=2.1.1.284; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:16274243};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: C-methyltransferase that methylates 8-demethylnovobiocic acid to produce novobiocic acid in the novobiocin biosynthesis pathway. Novobiocin is an aminocoumarin family antibiotic that targets bacterial DNA gyrases. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:16274243}.
